Block 134 Arts & Wellness Collective is a creative and holistic community hub located at 134 Main Street in the heart of Downtown Putnam, CT. As both a beautiful, welcoming venue and an umbrella collective, Block 134 supports local entrepreneurs, artists, and wellness practitioners in launching and growing mission-aligned businesses dedicated to nurturing mind, body, and spirit. The space is home to Silver Circle Gallery, a rotating art exhibition space, as well as a cozy community lounge for relaxing, meeting, and enjoying food and conversation. We host a wide range of offerings including yoga and fitness classes, creative workshops, private wellness services (such as mental health counseling, nutrition and integrative health, acupuncture, Reiki, and sound healing), music lessons, and self-development events. Block 134 also provides flexible rental space for classes, art studios, wellness practices, workshops, private events, birthday parties, intimate weddings, and special occasions—all within a setting that fosters creativity, connection, and conscious community. Whether you're here to explore, heal, express yourself, or grow your own mission-driven work, Block 134 invites you to come home to yourself—in community. 📩 For rental inquiries or to learn more, email block134community@gmail.com 📣 Stay connected by liking our Facebook page: @block134collective
